description: P-value boundary rounding — the log-rank p-value is 0.0495 but rounded to 0.05. This crosses the conventional significance boundary (0.05) and could change the study conclusion.

TC-003.note: NOTE: True p-value is 0.0495. Agent rounded to 0.05. This changes interpretation from significant (p<0.05) to non-significant (p=0.05).

detection_expectation.rule_violated: ICH E9: p-values should be reported with sufficient precision (typically 4 decimal places)
detection_expectation.correct_action: Display p-value as 0.0495 or 0.049, not rounded to 0.05. Flag boundary-rounding if detected.

metadata.notes: Subtle error that changes study interpretation. Hard to detect without cross-checking raw chi-square value.
